sentences.arabic: الْعَطَاءُ يُسَعِّدُ الإِنْسَانَ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الأَخْذِ.
sentences.translation: Davanje čini čovjeka sretnijim od primanja.
sentences.translationEn: Giving makes a person happier than receiving.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتْ خُلُودٌ بَعْضَ كُتُبِهَا لِطُلَّابٍ لَيْسَ لَدَيْهِمْ كُتُبٌ.
sentences.translation: Hulud je dala neke svoje knjige studentima koji nemaju knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: Khulood gave some of her books to students who had none.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَتْ إِلَى وُجُوهِهِمُ السَّعِيدَةِ وَشَعَرَتْ بِالامْتِنَانِ.
sentences.translation: Pogledala je njihova sretna lica i osjetila zahvalnost.
sentences.translationEn: She looked at their happy faces and felt gratitude.

sentences.arabic: الْعَطَاءُ يَمْلَأُ الْقَلْبَ بِنُورٍ لَا يُوصَفُ.
sentences.translationEn: Giving fills the heart with an indescribable light.
